'''''The Art of the Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition''''' includes behind-the-scenes sketches, storyboards, character illustrations, photos, and many more examples of the work of conceptual artists and designers who gave rise to the [[Original trilogy|original ''Star Wars'' trilogy]].

Some highlights of this volume include the enhanced [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] and [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] sequences from [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']], creatures created to populate [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], storyboards depicting the [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], character designs for the dancers and musicians from "[[Jedi Rocks/Legends|Jedi Rocks]]," and the first filmed appearance of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
